lid_open.text: What light through yonder lid breaks? 'Tis the fool, returning for the {count}th time.
To open, or not to open — that is the question thou hast answered {count} times today.
Once more unto the breach, dear friend! Lid the {count}th doth creak open.
The lady doth open too much, methinks.
All the world's a stage, and thou art merely opening and closing props.
Thou return'st like Banquo's ghost — uninvited and far too often.

lid_reopen.text: Parting is such sweet sorrow — for {seconds_since_close} seconds, apparently.
What, gone and back again? Even Romeo showed more commitment to leaving.
Brief as the lightning in the collied night — so was thy absence of {seconds_since_close} seconds.

late_night.text: 'Tis now the very witching time of night — {time}, to be precise. To bed, thou wretch!
The hour of {time} belongs to ghosts and fools. Thou art no ghost.
Sleep that knits up the ravell'd sleeve of care — thou deniest thyself at {time}!
By the pricking of my thumbs, something nocturnal this way comes. 'Tis thee. At {time}.

early_morning.text: But soft, what dawn through yonder window breaks? And thou art already at thy screen.
The lark hath not yet sung, yet here thou toil'st at {time}.
Early riseth the fool. Or the genius. Time shall reveal which thou art.

aggressive_typing.text: Thou dost pound the keys as though composing a declaration of war. {wpm} strokes per minute!
Is this a keyboard I see before me, its keys toward my hand? Thou strikest it with fury!
Sound and fury, signifying nothing — at {wpm} words per minute.
Thou typest as Macbeth murdered — with great passion and questionable judgment.

type_delete.text: Write, erase, write, erase. Even Hamlet was less indecisive. Well... perhaps not.
Out, damned word! Out, I say! Thou hast deleted {ratio}% of thy labours.
What's done cannot be undone — unless thou hast a backspace key, which thou abusest greatly.

thermal.text: Now is the winter of our discontent made glorious summer by thy overworked processor!
Hell is empty, and all the devils are in thy browser tabs.
Double, double toil and trouble; fire burn and laptop bubble!

idle.text: {idle_minutes} minutes of nothing! Tomorrow, and tomorrow, and tomorrow — is that thy plan?
To do, or not to do. Thou hast chosen 'not' for {idle_minutes} minutes.
How weary, stale, flat and unprofitable seem all the uses of this {idle_minutes}-minute void.
Thou art idle as a painted ship upon a painted ocean. For {idle_minutes} minutes.
